response.content: {"description": "A large-diaphragm condenser studio microphone with a matte champagne/silver metallic cylindrical body. The upper capsule section features a fine woven mesh grille in a darker silver tone. The body bears engraved text reading 'PHANTOM classic' and serial number 'Nr. 1307', along with a circular logo mark. The microphone is mounted in a silver elastic shock mount with black rubber bands. A circular black pop filter with dual-layer mesh is attached via a flexible gooseneck arm positioned in front of the capsule.", "consistencyTag": "silver-condenser-studio-microphone"}
